name: CurrencyBeacon API
description: REST API for real-time and historical currency exchange rates covering 170+ fiat currencies and cryptocurrencies, with 30 years of historical data, server-side conversion, timeseries analysis, and MCP server support for LLM integrations.

offers.name: Developer Sandbox
offers.description: Free tier with 5,000 requests/month and hourly rate updates.

availableChannel.name: GET /latest
availableChannel.description: Retrieve real-time mid-market exchange rates for a base currency.

availableChannel.name: GET /historical
availableChannel.description: Retrieve historical exchange rates for a specific date (up to 30 years of data).

availableChannel.name: GET /convert
availableChannel.description: Convert an amount from one currency to another using real-time or historical rates.

availableChannel.name: GET /timeseries
availableChannel.description: Retrieve exchange rate time-series data across a date range. Startup and Pro plans only.

availableChannel.name: GET /currencies
availableChannel.description: List all supported fiat currencies and cryptocurrencies.
